Multiple news outlets have highlighted his career trajectory and political associations during his 23-year tenure in the U.S. Senate.

shared_facts: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani has died at the age of 74.

Funeral prayers for Sheikh Hamad were held at the Imam Muhammad ibn Abd al-Wahhab Mosque in Doha.
Sheikh Hamad is to be buried at Lusail Cemetery.
latest_clusters.synthesis: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani, the former emir of Qatar who ruled from 1995 to 2013, has died at the age of 74. Following his death, funeral prayers were held for him at the Imam Muhammad ibn Abd al-Wahhab Mosque in Doha, attended by members of the ruling family and citizens. He was scheduled for burial at the Lusail Cemetery.
latest_clusters.confidence: HIGH. All provided articles are from a single news organization and present consistent, non-contradictory biographical and event-based information.
